title: Magical Attraction Practices with Kurukulla, Hayagriva, and Mahadeva
description_raw: Seminar via Zoom or in person, Saturday and Sunday 16.00-20.00 CET with breaks, focusing on magical attraction practices connected with Kurukulla, Hayagriva, Mahadeva, and Umadevi.
ai_summary: A hybrid seminar on Vajrayana magical attraction practices centered on the Wisdom Dakini Kurukulla and related deities, taught via Zoom and in-person.

title: Shitro Ngakso and Neydren Retreat
description_raw: Three-day retreat centered on the One Hundred Peaceful and Wrathful Deities at Pema Osel Ling with online livestream option. Includes Shitro Empowerment, purification practices, Ngondro, and Neydren ceremony for the deceased.
ai_summary: A hybrid Vajrayana retreat on June 11–13 featuring practices with the peaceful and wrathful deities, available both in person at Pema Osel Ling and online by livestream.

title: Vajrayogini Initiation and Commentary
description_raw: The Highest Yoga Tantra practice of Vajrayogini is especially effective in 'degenerate times' as it skillfully cuts through ignorance and cultivates profound wisdom, love, and compassion.
ai_summary: A Vajrayogini initiation and commentary taught by Gyumed Khensur Rinpoche Lobsang, open to practitioners interested in this Highest Yoga Tantra practice.

title: The 37 Factors of Enlightenment combined with the 5 Paths
start_local_text: Saturday June 13 and Sunday June 14, 10:00 AM to 12:00 Noon
description_raw: Khenpo Sangay Yeshi teaches a course on the 37 Factors of Enlightenment combined with the 5 paths, based on Patrul Rinpoche's text. Translator: Eric Forgeng. Fee: $60.
ai_summary: A Nyingma Buddhist course on the 37 Factors of Enlightenment and the Buddhist paths, taught by Khenpo Sangay Yeshi via Zoom over three weekends, open to anyone interested.

title: Tögal – from the Ying Rig Tö
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Geshe Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Seminar on Tögal practice from the Ying Rig Tö (Treasury of the Space of Awareness), taught by Menri Shedrup Khenpo Geshe Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche, running July 24-26, 2026.
ai_summary: A weekend seminar on advanced Tögal practice from the Dzogchen teachings, taught by a Bön Buddhist master.

title: Keksel Teaching Course - Part II
description_raw: Keksel Teaching Course - Part II with Chaphur Rinpoche in Poland, September 3-4, 2026. Keksel is a system of body, breath and energy work combining tantra and dzogchen elements.
ai_summary: A two-day Keksel practice teaching with Chaphur Rinpoche, focusing on body, breath, and energy work to harmonize mind and body and release tensions.

title: The teachings and initiation of Takla Mebar
description_raw: Teachings and initiation of Takla Mebar (Burning Tiger Deity) with Chaphur Rinpoche in Poland, September 5-6, 2026. A healing practice from the Yungdrung Bon tradition for clearing obstacles and negative energies.
ai_summary: A two-day Yungdrung Bön initiation and teachings of Takla Mebar, a powerful healing practice for clearing obstacles and transforming difficult emotions into wisdom.

title: Foundations of Tibetan Yoga: Tsalung and Lujong Intensive
description_raw: 3-5 day intensive in Tibetan Yoga covering Lujong, tsalung trulkhor, breathing methods (vase breath), wind obstacles, channels, winds and vital essences. No empowerment prerequisite.
ai_summary: A foundational 3-day intensive in Tibetan yogic practices (Lujong and Tsalung) taught by Dr. James Bae for dharma practitioners and the general public, offered in-person at Garchen Meditation Center.

title: Tummo Practice Preliminaries – Weekend 1
description_raw: Four-day Tummo practice preliminaries (continuation from 2025) taught by Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche on Zoom, divided into two weekends. Preparation retreat for basic level before next stage of practice in 2027.
ai_summary: A weekend intensive on Tummo yoga and tantric practice from the Yungdrung Bön tradition, teaching breathwork and movement to cultivate inner heat, clarity, and well-being.

title: Tummo Practice Preliminaries – Weekend 2
description_raw: Four-day Tummo practice preliminaries (continuation from 2025) taught by Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche on Zoom, divided into two weekends. Preparation retreat for basic level before next stage of practice in 2027.
ai_summary: A weekend intensive on Tummo yoga and tantric practice from the Yungdrung Bön tradition, teaching breathwork and movement to cultivate inner heat, clarity, and well-being.

title: Collection of Seven Treasures Guru Rinpoche Retreat
platform_detail: In-person at Pema Osel Ling with online participation available
description_raw: Ten-day Collection of Seven Treasures Guru Rinpoche Retreat at Pema Osel Ling, June 15–24, featuring empowerments, oral transmissions, group practice, tsok, jinsek fire pujas, sacred dance, and culminating siddhis on the final day.
ai_summary: A 10-day in-person and online Vajrayana retreat centered on Guru Rinpoche practice, led by H.E. Namgyal Dawa Rinpoche, open to all with financial assistance available.

title: Karma Pakshi Meditations – Introduction to the Three Kayas
description_raw: Karma Pakshi, the 2nd Karmapa, taught a series of meditations called 'Introduction to the Three Kayas' (also known as Four Kayas). This session is online and in-person.
ai_summary: A hybrid meditation teaching on Karma Pakshi's traditional Three Kayas practice, led by Charles Manson at The Buddhist Society.

title: Karma Pakshi Meditations – Introduction to the Three Kayas
description_raw: Karma Pakshi, the 2nd Karmapa, taught a series of meditations called 'Introduction to the Three Kayas' (also known as Four Kayas). A second session is scheduled for Wednesday 9 Sept.
ai_summary: A hybrid meditation teaching on Karma Pakshi's traditional Three Kayas practice, led by Charles Manson at The Buddhist Society.

title: Mudras in Mother Tantra
platform_detail: ligmincha.pl (in-person in Wilga, Poland + online option)
description_raw: Meditation course with Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche on Mother Tantra teachings and mudras (hand positions) used in Tibetan Bon meditation practices. The course will be conducted in English with Polish translation and is open to everyone, including beginners.
ai_summary: A three-day hybrid meditation and teaching course on Mother Tantra mudras with a senior Bon teacher, available in-person in Poland and online.

title: Pharping Retreat with Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche
description_raw: 10-day retreat in Pharping with daily teachings, meditation practice, group practice and Q&A; includes Tertön Pegyal Lingpa's Seven-Line Prayer Empowerment.
ai_summary: A 10-day in-person retreat in Pharping, Nepal led by Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche with teachings, meditation, and empowerment practices.

title: Maratika Amitayus Retreat with Yarinak Pilgrimage
description_raw: Pilgrimage and practice in Yarinak followed by an Amitayus retreat in Maratika, including teachings and practice on Amitayus from Tertön Pegyal Lingpa's tradition; includes Seven-Line Prayer Empowerment.
ai_summary: A two-location in-person retreat in Nepal (Yarinak pilgrimage and Maratika) combining pilgrimage, Amitayus practice teachings, and empowerment with Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche.

title: Muktinath (Chumig Gyatsa) Pilgrimage
description_raw: A pilgrimage to Chumig Gyatsa (Muktinath), one of the most sacred sites connected with Guru Rinpoche.
ai_summary: An in-person pilgrimage to Muktinath in Nepal led by Drupön Lama Karma Rinpoche, visiting one of the sacred sites associated with Guru Rinpoche.

title: Ayya Karunika Teaching Tour: Breakfast and Dharma
start_local_text: Thursday 18 Jun to Monday 22 Jun, Breakfast at 7am
description_raw: In-person retreat and teaching tour at Buddhist Fellowship (310 Lavender Street, Singapore) from 18–22 June with breakfast dana at 7am daily, plus lunch dana on Saturday 20th and Sunday 21st at 11:30am.
ai_summary: A multi-day in-person retreat and teaching tour led by Bhikkhuni Ayya Karunika in Singapore, with daily breakfast gatherings and optional lunch.

title: Tummo Practice Preliminaries (October)
description_raw: Four-day Tummo practice continuation retreat divided into two weekends (10–11 & 17–18 October 2026) on Zoom. Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche teaches preliminaries and preparation for advanced Tummo practice in 2027.
ai_summary: A two-weekend Zoom course on Tummo, an ancient Yungdrung Bon yogic practice using breath and body movement to cultivate inner heat, with Geshe Choekhortshang Rinpoche.

title: Manjushri Empowerment and Retreat
description_raw: Manjushri Empowerment and Retreat with Drubpon Tsering Rinpoche, 24–28 June 2026.
ai_summary: A multi-day Manjushri empowerment and retreat led by Drubpon Tsering Rinpoche in the Tibetan Buddhist tradition.

title: Dhamma Talk: Bailing Out the Boat, Reaching the Far Shore
description_raw: Dhamma talk by Bhikkhuni Ayya Kārunikā based on Snp. 4.1 Kamasutra and Snp 5.1 Ajithasutra about letting go of clinging and cultivating mindfulness in daily life.
ai_summary: A Theravada dhamma talk by Bhikkhuni Ayya Kārunikā on the Buddhist teachings of non-attachment and mindfulness, suitable for practitioners of all ages.

title: Exploring the Body of Light: Subtle Body Teachings
start_local_text: Sat. & Sun. July 25 & 26, 2026, 10:00 am - 2:00 pm both days (Central-Chicago Time)
description_raw: Khandro Kunzang will give an in-depth teaching on the subtle energy body according to Vajrayana Buddhism, covering channel formation, winds, perception, and the effects of sound and mantras on the subtle body.
ai_summary: A two-day online workshop on Buddhist tantric teachings about the subtle body, channels, and winds, led by Khandro Kunzang for students interested in Vajrayana yoga practices.

title: Dhamma Talk: Bailing Out the Boat, Reaching the Far Shore
description_raw: Dhamma talk on 'Bailing Out the Boat, Reaching the Far Shore' by Bhikkhuni Ayya Kārunika at Buddhist Fellowship, 310 Lavender Street, Singapore on Friday evening, 19 Jun 2026.
ai_summary: A Theravada dhamma talk by Bhikkhuni Ayya Kārunika on letting go and cultivating mindfulness, based on Pali suttas, held in-person at Buddhist Fellowship in Singapore.

title: Dzogchen Mumed Dalpa Summer Retreat — Week 1
description_raw: Foundational Dzogchen text (Mume Dalpa) teaching within the Yungdrung Bön tradition, with direct experience of the mind's natural, non-conceptual state. Summer Retreat at Shenten Dargye Ling and online.
ai_summary: A one-week intensive retreat on a core Dzogchen text in the Yungdrung Bön tradition, taught by Khenchen Tenpa Yungdrung Rinpoche, available both in-person at Shenten Dargye Ling and online via Zoom.

title: Dzogchen Mumed Dalpa Summer Retreat — Week 2
description_raw: Foundational Dzogchen text (Mume Dalpa) teaching within the Yungdrung Bön tradition, continuation of the summer retreat. Week 2 of a three-week series.
ai_summary: The second week of an intensive retreat on a core Dzogchen text in the Yungdrung Bön tradition, taught by Khenchen Tenpa Yungdrung Rinpoche, available both in-person and online via Zoom.

title: Dzogchen Mumed Dalpa Summer Retreat — Week 3
description_raw: Foundational Dzogchen text (Mume Dalpa) teaching within the Yungdrung Bön tradition, final week of the summer retreat. Week 3 of a three-week series.
ai_summary: The final week of an intensive retreat on a core Dzogchen text in the Yungdrung Bön tradition, taught by Khenchen Tenpa Yungdrung Rinpoche, available both in-person at Shenten Dargye Ling and online via Zoom.

title: Seminar: Tögal from the Ying Rig Toe
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Geshe Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Seminar on Tögal (direct introduction to the nature of mind) from the Ying Rig Toe teachings, taught by Menri Shedrup Khenpo Geshe Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche.
ai_summary: A Bön/Tibetan Buddhist seminar on the Tögal teachings, led by a senior Menri tradition teacher.

title: Natural Freedom Upon Hearing Teachings on the Bardos - Part 2
description_raw: Part 2 of teachings on the bardos by Gochen Tulku Sang-ngag Rinpoche, founder of Ewam International, translated by Vanessa Kubota. Two sessions offered on the same day.
ai_summary: A two-session Tibetan Buddhist teaching on the bardos (intermediate states after death) by a recognized Rinpoche, open to students whether or not they attended Part 1.

title: Public Lecture: Wandering and Meditating in Wild Places
description_raw: Public lecture by Dr. Julia Stenzel on wandering and meditating in wild places, hosted by Rangjung Yeshe Institute via Zoom (Meeting ID: 431 318 1117, Passcode: 108108).
ai_summary: A Zoom-based public lecture about meditation and wild places by Dr. Julia Stenzel, open to anyone interested in Buddhist practice and nature.

title: Kalachakra Retreat
description_raw: Drikung Dzogchen Community of Vermont: Kalachakra Retreat August 1-3. Join us August 1-3 for a rare and profound retreat on Mahamudra and Nature of Mind.
ai_summary: A three-day Tibetan Buddhist retreat on Kalachakra, Mahamudra, and Nature of Mind, hosted by the Drikung Dzogchen Community of Vermont.

title: Experiential Transmission of Zhang Zhung
description_raw: Zhang Zhung Nyen Gyud is the orally transmitted Dzogchen lineage of Zhang Zhung, belonging to the highest category of Dzogchen teachings — an extremely rare unbroken lineage.
ai_summary: A rare five-day Dzogchen transmission teaching on the Zhang Zhung lineage with Khenchen Tenpa Yungdrung Rinpoche.

title: Keeping the Robe Alive (Part 1)
description_raw: What does monastic life look like in today's world? Ayya Upekkha shares how we can support the monastic rules and sustain the Dhamma with courage.
ai_summary: A talk by Ayya Upekkha on monastic life, the robes, and supporting the Buddhist monastic community in the modern world.

title: Savour the Nikayas – SN (Part 3)
description_raw: Back by popular demand! Join Sis Sylvia as she brings the Samyutta Nikaya to life with clarity, and her characteristic cheerful humour.
ai_summary: A teaching on the Samyutta Nikaya (SN) by Sis Sylvia Bay, exploring the Buddha's discourses on connected teachings.

title: Meditation Sunday
description_raw: A full morning to just breathe. Let Bro Beng Hock guide you once again through stillness, calm, and the joy of a settled mind.
ai_summary: A guided meditation session led by Bro Tan Beng Hock focusing on breathing, stillness, and mental calm.

title: What is to be Abandoned, and How?
description_raw: We're honoured to host Bhante Seelananda, who was born in Sri Lanka and is currently based in US, for 4 power-packed sessions.
ai_summary: A Dhamma talk by visiting teacher Bhante Seelananda on the topic of abandoning unwholesome states in Buddhist practice.

title: Teachings on Heart Sutra
description_raw: Teachings by Kyabjé Khen Rinpoche Tashi Palden on the Heart Sutra, hosted by Rangjung Yeshe Gomde Pyrénées. Runs 25th July to 3rd August 2026 at 11am CET, available onsite and online.
ai_summary: A multi-day Vajrayana Buddhist teaching on the Heart Sutra by a respected Khenpo, offered both in person and online.

title: Kalachakra initiation with teachings on Three Principal Aspects of the Path and Lojong
description_raw: Kalachakra initiation with teachings on the Three Principal Aspects of the Path and Lojong, part of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day London teaching programme in September.
ai_summary: A two-day Kalachakra initiation with teachings on foundational Buddhist philosophy and mind training, led by a visiting Tibetan Buddhist master.

title: Cittamani Tara initiation and oral transmission
description_raw: Cittamani Tara initiation and oral transmission, part of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day London teaching programme in September.
ai_summary: A single-day Tara deity initiation and teachings with oral transmission, led by a visiting Tibetan Buddhist master.

title: Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha jenangs with commentary on Lama Chöpa
description_raw: Lama Tsongkhapa and Medicine Buddha jenangs (empowerments) with commentary on the Lama Chöpa (Guru Puja), part of His Eminence Jhado Rinpoche's five-day London teaching programme in September.
ai_summary: A two-day programme of Buddhist empowerments and teachings on guru devotion practices, led by a visiting Tibetan Buddhist master.

title: Cittamani Tara Weekend — Teachings and Initiation
description_raw: A rare opportunity to receive the Cittamani Tara initiation, a profound highest yoga tantra initiation associated with the enlightened activity of Green Tara, the embodiment of compassion in action.
ai_summary: A Tibetan Buddhist weekend retreat with teachings and initiation into Cittamani Tara practice led by Gyumed Khensur Rinpoche Lobsang Jampa.

title: The Buddha's Teachings in Business
description_raw: Event hosted by Shang Shung Institute UK exploring Buddhist teachings in business context.
ai_summary: A teaching on how Buddhist philosophy applies to business and worldly affairs, led by Lopen Karma Phuntsho.

title: Open, Spacious, and Free: A Mahamudra Meditation Retreat
description_raw: FREE ONLINE PROGRAM: Open, Spacious, and Free: A Mahamudra Meditation Retreat from Drala Mountain Center.
ai_summary: A free online Mahamudra meditation retreat offered by Drala Mountain Center for practitioners interested in Vajrayana Buddhism.

title: 30-day Ch'an Retreat
description_raw: A 30-day Ch'an retreat in Poland led by Venerable Chi Chern Fashi from Master Sheng Yen's Dharma lineage.
ai_summary: An intensive 30-day in-person Ch'an meditation retreat in Poland for practitioners in the Chinese Ch'an tradition.

title: 2026 Summer Dzogchen Retreat
description_raw: Dzogchen pith instructions and empowerment of Vajrakilaya according to the lineage of Tsasum Lingpa. July 18-25, 2026 at Padma Samye Ling in upstate NY. Available in person and live webcast.
ai_summary: A week-long Dzogchen retreat with Vajrayana teachings and Vajrakilaya empowerment led by Ven. Khenpo Tsewang Dongyal Rinpoche, available both in-person at Padma Samye Ling (NY) and via live webcast.

title: Teachings on Seventeen Meditation Stages of the Great Secret Mother Tantra
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Online teachings from Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche on the Seventeen Meditation Stages of the Great Secret Mother Tantra, Thugjé Nyima.
ai_summary: Online teachings by the Abbot of the Bön Dialectic School at Menri Monastery on tantric meditation practices.

title: The Seventeen Meditation Stages of the Great Secret Mother Tantra, Thugjé Nyima
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche teaches the Seventeen Meditation Stages of the Great Secret Mother Tantra in Budapest, July 3–5, 2026. All teachings available online.
ai_summary: A rare teaching on tantric meditation practices from the Bön tradition, available both in person and online.

title: Special Mudras and Practices of Mother Tantra
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Teaching on Special Mudras and Practices of Mother Tantra in Wilga, Poland, July 10–12, 2026. Available online.
ai_summary: A tantric teachings workshop on mudras and Mother Tantra practices from the Bön tradition, available both in person and online.

title: Trekchö from the Namkha Trulzod (The Miraculous Treasury of Space)
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Teaching on Trekchö practices in Poznań, Poland, July 17–19, 2026. Available online.
ai_summary: An advanced Bön teaching on Trekchö (a direct awareness practice) available both in person and online.

title: Thögal Practice from the Ying Rig Zod (Treasury of the Expanse of Awareness)
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Teaching on Thögal practices in Berlin, Germany, July 24–26, 2026. Available online.
ai_summary: An advanced Bön teaching on Thögal (a vision-based practice) available both in person and online.

title: Profound Meditation Stages from A-tri Teachings
teacher: Menri Shedrup Khenpo Nyima Dhondup Rinpoche
description_raw: Retreat on Profound Meditation Stages from A-tri Teachings in Vienna, Austria, July 30 – August 3, 2026. Available online.
ai_summary: An intensive Bön meditation retreat on advanced A-tri teachings available both in person and online.

title: Teachings with Shechen Rabjam Rinpoche
description_raw: Teachings on the Quintessence of the Profound Path, Heart Advice poems of Dilgo Khyentse Rinpoche, and blessing empowerments including Guru Rinpoche, Orgyen Menla, Green Tara and long-life blessing at Lerab Ling, France.
ai_summary: A multi-day Nyingma Buddhist teaching and empowerment event led by Shechen Rabjam Rinpoche at Lerab Ling in France, featuring teachings on guru yoga and Heart Advice, plus blessing empowerments.

title: Dakini Tummo — Highest Yoga Tantra Classes
start_local_text: Friday, July 10th, at 3pm Eastern Time / 8pm UK time
description_raw: Ongoing series of Tummo classes with emphasis on embodied and intuitive approach to Highest Yoga Tantra, welcoming especially to female practitioners. Weekly sessions beginning July 10th featuring Vajrayogini Generation Stage and Six Yogas of Naropa Completion Stage practices.
ai_summary: A weekly online Vajrayana practice group led by Gosia focusing on Tummo and Highest Yoga Tantra techniques, designed for intuitive and embodied practice within a supportive community.

title: Lung and Tri (Oral Transmission and Commentary) on Dudjom Rinpoche's Short Ngondro
teacher: Lama Pema Chophel (receiver of the transmission from Kyabje Dudjom Rinpoche and Sonam T. Kazi)
description_raw: Transmission of Dudjom Rinpoche's short ngondro composed for busy modern practitioners; includes lung (oral transmission) and tri (commentary); 90-minute session on July 18. Samaya commitment required: 111,111 recitations of each of five accumulations within one year.
ai_summary: A 90-minute Zoom teaching on preliminary practices (ngondro) from the Nyingma tradition, led by a senior teacher with direct authorization from Dudjom Rinpoche; participants must commit to completing 111,111 recitations of each practice within one year.
